name: io.github.josh-e-s/pexip-mgmt-mcp
description: Read and operate a Pexip Infinity deployment via the Management API: VMRs, devices, dial plan, policy, live call control, status and CDR reporting.

environmentVariables.name: PEXIP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Management Node hostname or IP (no scheme).

environmentVariables.name: PEXIP_OAUTH2_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OAuth2 ES256 private key, PEM (oauth2 auth).

environmentVariables.name: PEXIP_VERIFY_TLS
environmentVariables.description: Verify the Management Node TLS certificate.

environmentVariables.name: PEXIP_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Expose only read tools; remove all write/control tools at startup. Defaults to true (secure by default) — set to false to enable the mutating admin surface.

environmentVariables.name: PEXIP_ALLOW_SECURITY_RESOURCES
environmentVariables.description: When false (default), generic CRUD refuses to mutate security-critical resources (SSH keys, admin roles/permissions, auth/SSO, TLS/CA certs). Only relevant when PEXIP_READ_ONLY=false.
